title: Harry Leary’s Toolbox
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A wear-marked multi-drawer toolbox identified by the collection as Harry Leary’s. Its surface retains motorcycle and racing stickers, turning use, age and personal preference into visible evidence.
provenance_summary: Presented as part of the Harry Leary Collection; acquisition detail was not supplied in this source package.
qualifications: The toolbox and stickers are visible in the supplied source image.
No contents inventory or independent ownership documentation was supplied with this release.
